name: Maple Street Community Garden
title: Community garden
summary: A welcoming one-pager for a neighborhood community garden — plots and pricing, a waitlist signup, volunteer workdays, rules, and seasonal events.
setup_questions: What's the garden's name and which neighborhood or street is it on?
What plot sizes do you rent and what's the annual fee for each?
How many volunteer hours are members expected to contribute (e.g. 2 hours/month)?
What's the best contact email or person for the waitlist?
photo_terms: community garden raised beds vegetables volunteers
hands planting seedlings in soil close up
ripe tomatoes and leafy greens garden harvest
sections: Hero with garden name, neighborhood, and 'Join the plot waitlist' CTA
About — mission, history, and who tends the garden
Plots & pricing — bed sizes (e.g. 4x8, 4x12), annual fees, what's included (water, tools, compost)
How to join — waitlist signup form and the 48-hour response policy
Volunteer workdays — calendar of monthly drop-in days and the required volunteer hours
Garden rules — organic-only, plot upkeep, shared-area etiquette
Events — seed swap, spring kickoff, potlucks, harvest festival
Find us — address, map, and gate-access notes
Photo gallery of the beds across the seasons
based_on: A neighborhood community garden with rentable raised-bed plots, a volunteer-hours requirement, a plot waitlist, and seasonal events — modeled on programs like the East Hollywood Community Garden and municipal plot rentals.
